prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Trench protection, part of the Sitework & Utilities scope. The observed field condition is: trench box void behind shield. The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1926 Subpart P. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Trench protection (commercial project)
